summary: Frontend verification of yield-banner fix for fahita-view on /warehouse-manufacturing (التصنيع tab). FIX IS INCOMPLETE — yield banner still shows '300.000 حصة' instead of expected '3.750 حصة'. Cost section is CORRECT (1,856 IQD total, 495 IQD لكل حصة).

ui_bugs.issue: Yield banner for 'دجاج فاهيتا (عرض)' displays '300.000 حصة' (BUG) instead of expected '3.750 حصة'. The fix was applied to computeCostBreakdown() at line 1626-1630 (where `usesPieceDef` correctly gates the weight-main override), but there is a DUPLICATE inline yield calculation at line 3434-3437 inside the JSX render block that powers the yield-banner. That duplicate calc was NOT updated and still does `calcYield = totalGrams/mainUnitFactor` unconditionally when product.unit is weight, ignoring piece_def_value. As a result the banner renders the wrong number. The cost side is correct because the unit_cost shown ('لكل حصة 495 IQD') comes from product.unit_cost_after_waste returned by backend (already fixed) — not from the buggy local calcYield.

action_items: Better: extract this yield-calculation logic into a shared helper to avoid future drift between computeCostBreakdown and the JSX inline calc (DRY violation — the same ~40 lines of yield math are duplicated).
critical_code_review_comments: WarehouseManufacturing.js (8243 lines) — yield calculation is duplicated in at least TWO places (computeCostBreakdown ~line 1597 AND inline JSX at ~line 3400). The fix was only applied to one, causing this bug. DRY violation: extract to a single helper computeYield(product, rawMaterials).
File size remains excessive (>700 lines guideline). Should be split into smaller modules.

The yield-banner data-testid is good ✅. However the per-product card lacks a stable testid (e.g., data-testid={`product-card-${product.id}`}) — would make targeted testing more reliable than scanning all banners and walking up the DOM.

success_rate.frontend: 33% (1/3: cost number is correct; yield-banner number is WRONG; regression OK — other cards render fine)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed fahita-view (id=fahita-view, name='دجاج فاهيتا (عرض)', unit=غرام, piece_def_value=80, piece_def_unit=غرام, piece_weight=1, piece_weight_unit=حصة, recipe=[{مكونات, 300, غرام}], quantity=0) — verified in MongoDB before testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login (admin@maestroegp.com/admin123) works. Navigate to /warehouse-manufacturing, wait ~8s, click [data-testid=tab-manufacturing] (twice if needed). Three cards render: 'لحم برغر' (count حبة), 'كراة مشروم' (count حبة), 'دجاج فاهيتا (عرض)' (weight غرام + piece حصة). The yield-banner for fahita reads literally: '📐 العائد المحسوب من الوصفة: 300.000 حصة · وزن القطعة 1 حصة = 80 غرام · إجمالي الوصفة 300 غرام'. Expected after full fix: '3.750 حصة'. To verify fix retest playwright: read textContent of [data-testid=yield-banner] and assert it contains '3.750 حصة' for the fahita card.
rca of the issue:
Root cause: incomplete fix. The yield formula was duplicated in two places in WarehouseManufacturing.js:
  (A) computeCostBreakdown() at line 1626-1630 — FIXED with `!usesPieceDef` guard.
  (B) Inline JSX calc at line 3434-3437 that powers the yield-banner — NOT FIXED.
The banner renders `finalYield.toFixed(3)` where finalYield comes from the buggy (B) calc. For fahita-view (unit=غرام, mainUnitFactor=1, totalGrams=300, pieceGrams=80, piece_def_value=80): (B) returns 300/1 = 300 ❌. After applying the same guard, it should fall through to calcYieldRaw = 300/80 = 3.75 ✅.
Reproduction: Login admin → /warehouse-manufacturing → tab التصنيع → observe 'دجاج فاهيتا (عرض)' card yield-banner shows 300.000 حصة. Mitigation: apply identical `!usesPieceDef` guard to line 3435 (pdv/pdu are already declared above at 3412-3413). Long-term: extract computeYield to a shared helper to eliminate the duplication.
